name: perfdigest-mcp
summary: Local MCP server that digests development-loop reports — profilers (NVIDIA ncu, AMD rocprof, Linux perf, Apple Metal, chrome-trace), build tools (ptxas, clang -ftime-trace, cmake, ninja, cargo), benchmarks (criterion), CI run logs, and git change state — into token-efficient JSON for LLM coding agents.
author: Hamza Usta
